summary: Curated the first-print command surface around source-backed Federal Register and Regulations.gov recipes, with clean agent-ready text and explicit comment-window booleans.
reason: Policy monitoring workflows need stable agent-ready outputs with explicit source caveats, readable excerpt text, and visible false comment-window states, not raw endpoint mirroring that pushes upstream filter details and JSON cleanup into every caller.
validated_outcome: Live validation covered Federal Register search/rules plus Regulations.gov docket and comments reads; unit tests cover Federal Register span stripping, HTML entity unescaping, and explicit false comment-window JSON booleans. Deadline polling is documented for a configured api.data.gov key because DEMO_KEY can rate-limit.
